overview: Miinsolio is a portfolio management app for tracking stocks, crypto, forex, commodities, real estate and more — with real-time prices, multi-currency support, and full Vietnamese/English language support.
features: Track stocks, crypto, forex, commodities, and real estate
Real-time price feeds (Yahoo Finance, CoinGecko, Frankfurter)
Import and export full portfolio as JSON for account migration
Portfolio performance charts and KPI statistics
